scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/dashboard run build && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/dashboard run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run typecheck
